title: funkychunky.com
description: Funky Chunky offers gourmet caramel corn and popcorn snacks, providing unique gift options perfect for various occasions such as business gatherings, birthdays, and holidays. Their product range includes snack bags, tins, pails, canisters, and premium gifts with a variety of flavors including Sea Salt Caramel and Peanut Butter Cup. They also specialize in corporate gifting and wholesale solutions. Funky Chunky emphasizes customer convenience with features like free shipping on orders over $75 and the ability to send gifts to multiple addresses.
